notes: Framerates plummet to between 30 and 40 once NPC's enter the screen. Frames appear to be directly affected by raising and lowering the resolution, bit depth, and detail settings. If it weren't for the low performance for such an old game I would rank it Platinum. Conversely, on Windows it runs at a solid 60fps the entire time.
title: Dungeon Siege

notes: very bad performance. around 10fps @1920x1080 with 32bit. but runs out of the box
title: Dungeon Siege

notes: Performance is slightly better than on Windows 10, and the game requires none of the configuration OoTB on Pop!_OS that it does to work properly on Windows 10. The only thing I need to do(and it's really optional) is set the command line arguments to run at a custom resolution(I.E. anything above 1024x768).
title: Dungeon Siege

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
title: Dungeon Siege

notes:
I 've managed to run Killah's Fix(which enables the DLC and extra content for the game) on Proton by copying all the patch content to "$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Dungeon Siege 1/" and executing the following:


cd "$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Proton 4.2" && STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH="$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/39190" ./proton run dist/lib/wine/fakedlls/cmd.exe


, then cd'ing to the game folder and executing the "RegPatch DS I.bat"

For custom resolution or skipping intro videos you can set those on launcher option:

width=1366 height=768 bpp=32 nointro=true
title: Dungeon Siege
